LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER ST. OLAF COLLEGE'S AMENDED MOTION FOR ORDER TO CHARGE MEMBER'S INTEREST IN A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY - THE ORDER CHARGING MEMBER'S INTEREST IN A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DATED JULY 27, 2012 IS HEREBY VACATED. THE MOTION SHOULD NOT HAVE BEEN HEARD ON THAT DATE DUE TO THE AMENDED NOTICE FILED ON JULY 16, 2012. THE MOTION IS NOW GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

Amended Notice Of Motion For Order To Charge Member'S Interest In A Limited Liability Company
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BENJAMIN W. WHITE OF WHITE/WOODS LLP, TEL. NO. (925) 280-0100 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ST. OLAF COLLEGE's Amended Motion For Order To Charge Member'S Interest In A Limited Liability Company - The Order Charging Member's Interest In A Limited Liability Company dated July 27, 2012 is hereby vacated. The motion should not have been heard on that date due to the amended notice filed on July 16, 2012. The motion is now granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
=(302/EHG)
